title: Stenocereus eichlamii
taxonomy: Stenocereus eichlamii is a species of cactus in the family Cactaceae. It belongs to the subfamily Cactoideae and tribe Pachycereeae. The genus Stenocereus is a group of cacti that are native to the Americas and are known for their columnar stems. Stenocereus eichlamii is one of the species within this genus that is native to South America. The classification of Stenocereus eichlamii is a way to understand its evolutionary relationships and place it within the larger group of cacti.

This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits, including the treatment of fever, inflammation, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties.
